/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/GUI/Screen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/GUI/LoginScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/GUI/DashboardScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/GUI/MarketScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/GUI/PortfolioScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/GUI/TradeScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/GUI/PerformanceScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/GUI/SettingsScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/GUI/GUIManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/Core/MutualFund.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/Core/Investment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/Core/Snapshot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/Core/Transaction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/Core/Portfolio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/Core/Investor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/Core/FundManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/Data/FilePersistence.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/Utils/Button.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/Utils/TextBox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/Utils/Panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/protrack.dir/src/Utils/ChartRenderer.cpp.o -o protrack  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
